reasoning: Sheikh Hasina is currently residing in India following her ousting in August 2024. Despite formal extradition requests from the interim government of Bangladesh led by Muhammad Yunus and interpol red notices requested in April 2025, India has indicated no willingness to extradite her. In fact, India extended her visa in January 2025. Given the narrow timeframe of May 12, 2025 to July 1, 2025 (less than two months away from the present), and that India is actively sheltering her, the base rate for an exiled leader returning under these circumstances without a sudden political upheaval is incredibly low. I estimate the chance of her returning in this window to be roughly 2%.
